name: smart-citizen-idea-innovation-portal
description: Full-stack Smart Citizen Idea & Innovation Portal

scripts.//install:all: Used by the Railway build. The backend needs no dev dependencies to run, so they are skipped: that keeps nodemon and sqlite3 (a native module, tests only) out of the deploy entirely. The frontend keeps its dev dependencies because vite and tailwind are what build it.
scripts.install:all: npm install --omit=dev --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
